quest.intro.hotkeys.desc_1: Below is a list of hotkeys you might find useful while playing.
quest.intro.hotkeys.desc_11: §6F:§r When holding a gun, interact as though using right click. When using the item scrapper table, place item on table.
quest.intro.hotkeys.desc_15: §6R:§rWhen holding a gun, reload. When holding a melee weapon, throw weapon.
quest.intro.hotkeys.desc_16: §6V:§r Melee if gun has a melee weapon.
quest.intro.hotkeys.desc_2: Feel free to rebind them in the controls menu!
quest.intro.hotkeys.subtitle: The numbers... what do they mean?!
quest.intro.hotkeys.title: Hotkey List
